designer.note: Designer name cited as 'Gasson' across multiple sources; full firm name unconfirmed.

holes.note: Three nine-hole loops named Andreas, Brookie, and Calypso. Visitors play 18 of 27.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: All-inclusive package rate (green fee + caddie + cart). Visitor walk-in rate may differ. Verify against official rate card.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: All-inclusive package rate (green fee + caddie + cart).

caddie_fee_thb.note: Caddie fee included in the package green fee. Actual caddie fee unknown if priced separately.

cart_fee_thb.note: Cart fee included in the package green fee.

prose.overview: Pattana Golf Club & Resort is a 27-hole resort course in Sriracha, Chonburi, built in 2004 and set across approximately 400 acres of forested land. The course is organised into three nine-hole loops — Andreas, Brookie, and Calypso — allowing visitors to combine any two for a full 18-hole round. Golfers typically play to a par-72 standard across whichever pair of nines is assigned on the day. The resort side of the property includes accommodation, tennis courts, and sports facilities, making it a practical option for groups mixing golf with other activities. At approximately 95km from central Bangkok, it sits closer to the city than most Pattaya-area courses, and the Sriracha location puts it on the Bangkok–Pattaya corridor. Package green fees — which include caddie and cart — are mid-range for the region at approximately 2,300 THB on weekdays.
prose.layout_and_experience: The three nines at Pattana differ in character, offering some variety depending on which two a golfer plays. The course was built to championship standards across a 400-acre property, incorporating water features, undulating fairways, and tree-lined corridors that reward accuracy off the tee. The layout has a resort feel rather than a private-club competitive atmosphere — conditions are well-maintained but the emphasis is on an enjoyable round rather than a stern examination. Fairways are generous enough for mid-handicappers to score on, while water and bunkering create risk-reward decisions for better players. The caddies are integral to the experience and help with club selection across a course where the elevation changes on some nines can be tricky to read on a first visit. With caddie and cart included in the standard package, the logistics of a round here are straightforward.
prose.tips: Pattana is one of the closer Pattaya-region courses to Bangkok, making it viable as a day trip without an early pre-dawn start. Weekday mornings are quieter than weekends when resort guests and local members account for most tee sheets. The resort setting means facilities — changing rooms, restaurant, and practice areas — are generally well-maintained. If you plan to mix in other sports or need accommodation mid-trip between Bangkok and Pattaya, Pattana's resort infrastructure is more complete than most standalone courses in the area. Confirm which two nine-hole combinations are available on your date before booking, as the rotation varies.
prose.location_and_access: Pattana Golf Club & Resort is located approximately 95km southeast of central Bangkok in Khaokhunsong, Sriracha, Chonburi. The drive from Bangkok takes around 75 minutes via the Bang Na–Trat Expressway (Highway 7). Pattana is positioned before Pattaya city itself, making it easily reachable without navigating central Pattaya traffic. Grab and pre-arranged golf transfers from Bangkok or Pattaya hotels are the main transport options for visiting golfers.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing Pattana Golf Club & Resort on a Bangkok day trip? Rent quality clubs delivered to your hotel — no airline baggage fees, no airport queues.
